name: replace-demo-user-identity-defaults
title: Replace demo user identity defaults
description: 前端 API 层大量默认 owner-demo / visitor-demo，需替换为显式 owner/visitor 会话身份边界。
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented identity boundary slice on 2026-05-06: production frontend no longer ships owner-demo/visitor-demo; DEFAULT_OWNER_ID is empty, DEFAULT_VISITOR_ID uses stable anonymous visitor helper; backend create tavern now returns 401 without explicit owner identity. Verification passed: frontend identity/runtime focused scripts, full npm test, typecheck, build, compileall, focused pytest identity/create-wizard/v1-runtime.
